title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform reliability improvements that make OpsPal more stable during startup. Users will experience fewer interruptions and error messages when beginning new work sessions, allowing RevOps teams to get started faster and work more efficiently.

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically fixes startup issues and shows clear error messages
details: The platform now resolves common startup problems in the background and provides helpful guidance when manual fixes are needed

entries.headline: Eliminated false error warnings during session startup
